title: Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme: Strengthening gender in investment policy reforms in Tanzania, October 2023
body: "This report identifies entry points for Government of Tanzania to strengthen women’s economic empowerment within the ongoing investment policy reform agenda. It explores the opportunities and challenges for investment policy reforms to promote women’s economic empowerment. It looks at three case study examples to understand this. The report also examines current initiatives and opportunities for investment policy reform in Tanzania. It aims to identify entry points for reform to positively impact women’s economic empowerment. "

taxons.title: Women and girls in developing countries
